targets.name: 示例群聊名称

vision._vision_comment: mode: agent_llm(default)|llm_vision|hook. sources: ordered list of mmx|hook:<name>|ocr. fallback_metadata: return file format/size/dims when all sources fail.

session_policy._require_followup_intent_comment: true/unset = session messages go to reply_decision; false = session follow-ups stay silent

targets._reliable_pipeline_comment: Set reliable_pipeline_target to true and dedicated_agent_instance_id to a registered hermes instance id to opt this target into the reliable pipeline. Empty string means no dedicated binding.
targets._knowledge_bases_comment: Each target can bind at most ONE knowledge-base alias (local or online). Remove the second alias if you want online retrieval.

targets.name: 示例群聊名称

vision._vision_comment: mode: agent_llm(default)|llm_vision|hook. sources: ordered list of mmx|hook:<name>|ocr. fallback_metadata: return file format/size/dims when all sources fail.

session_policy._require_followup_intent_comment: true/unset = session messages go to reply_decision; false = session follow-ups stay silent

targets._reliable_pipeline_comment: Set reliable_pipeline_target to true and dedicated_agent_instance_id to a registered hermes instance id to opt this target into the reliable pipeline. Empty string means no dedicated binding.

reply_engine._disable_local_kb_comment: Set to true to skip all local KBs and rely on online providers or wiki/core only.
reply_engine._kb_limit_comment: Independent caps for core rules and scene knowledge hits. Raise scene_limit to feed more KB context to the agent.

_send_mode_comment: Options: foreground (UIA/OCR/physical), backend (clipboard+PostMessage), cua (CUA driver main-window path), cua_separate_window/cua_window (CUA background send to pre-opened independent chat window, default), backend_then_foreground, cua_then_foreground
